name: io.argoproj.workflow.v1alpha1.Column
description: Column is a custom column that will be exposed in the Workflow List View.

key.description: The key of the label or annotation, e.g., "workflows.argoproj.io/completed".

name.description: The name of this column, e.g., "Workflow Completed".

type.description: The type of this column, "label" or "annotation".
